plugins.name: AgentToolPlugin
plugins.returns: any (JSON object/array bodies are parsed; non-JSON bodies returned as string)
plugins.summary: Invoke a registered agent tool by name.

plugins.name: SkillToolPlugin
plugins.summary: Load a skill bundle by name.

plugins.name: HttpRequestPlugin
plugins.summary: Perform an HTTP request. Non-2xx responses are returned, not thrown.

plugins.name: McpToolPlugin
plugins.summary: Call a tool exposed by a registered MCP server.

plugins.name: CodeExecPlugin
plugins.summary: Run sandboxed code. Always set language="java" — other languages are temporarily disabled.

plugins.name: AiChatPlugin
plugins.summary: Call an LLM via ModelProviderRouter and return the assistant text.
